ksa_text: Knowledge of data and AI maturity assessment frameworks and how to diagnose organizational capability gaps across strategy, governance, architecture, talent, and culture dimensions.

dcwf.top_element_label: Demonstrate to executive stakeholders how data and analytics initiatives address agency challenges.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA LS-K-006 (Leadership and Strategy/Knowledge) scores 0.517 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.517) and is edge_case for the ISO 8000 Data Manager role.
